name: LockInByteMixer_0.979556
author: Anmar Hindi
headline_metric_description: Lock-In Byte Mixer (LBM): high-confidence-only byte-level mixture of NN softmax (proper byte_0 marginal + chain-rule remainder) and PPM-D byte conditional, gated by lambda = 1 - sigmoid(alpha*(PPM_conf - beta)) with alpha=25.0 beta=0.9999 (very sharp gate; only mixes PPM when its top-symbol probability is near-certain). Run on FULL CaseOps validation set (all 47,851,520 tokens / 164,594,398 canonical bytes per seed). Forensic evidence: 'cond_ppm tokens=47851520 bytes=164594398' line in each train_seed*.log.
